revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-1050

A radionavigation transmitting system comprising a master station about which three (or more) slave stations are more or less symmetrically located.

Reference: I.R.E. (modified)
